title: Plinth project benchmark run metrics v1
description: Canonical shape for a benchmark harness run record. All top-level groups and nested fields are optional in this schema. Each scenario Gherkin feature defines which fields MUST be populated for that case.

wall_clock_s.description: Elapsed wall-clock seconds for the run.

active_agent_s.description: Seconds the agent was actively working; excludes idle wait where measurable.

tokens_total.description: Total tokens for the run. Prefer tokens_in + tokens_out when both are known.

cost_usd.description: Estimated or billed USD cost for the run.

outcome_quality.description: Outcome quality metrics for the run.

acceptance_pass.description: Whether the run met the scenario @acceptance-test outcome and product happy path for the case.

acceptance_coverage.description: Share of acceptance criteria satisfied when measurable.

rework_turns.description: Number of human or agent rework turns after the first attempt.

artifact_completeness.description: Whether required deliverables for the case were produced.

protocol_labels.description: Protocol labels identifying the run context.

scenario.description: Folder id for the benchmark scenario.

case_id.description: Stable case id for the run.

tool.description: Agent tool used for the run (for example cursor, codex, github-copilot, claude-code).

model.description: Model identifier used for the run.

plinth_config.description: Plinth configuration level (for example bare-agent, no-openspec, full-plinth).

commit.description: Git commit SHA of the workspace under test when the run starts.

retry_count.description: Number of retries for this run.

human_intervention_min.description: Minutes of human intervention during the run.

solution_snapshot.description: Durable snapshot of the implementation tree under demo/ before the folder is restored. Captures how each run structured files for cross-scenario comparison.

demo_root.description: Repository-relative path to the demo implementation root (for example benchmarks/scenario1/demo/).

tree_format.description: Format of the decoded tree_b64 payload.

tree_b64.description: Base64-encoded directory tree of demo_root at run completion. Empty string only for placeholder result templates.

file_count.description: Number of files under demo_root excluding .gitkeep when the snapshot was taken.

plinth_usage.description: Plinth skills, commands, and agents used during the run.

skills_count.description: Number of distinct skills read or invoked; MUST equal the length of skills when both are present.

commands_count.description: Number of distinct Plinth commands read or invoked; MUST equal the length of commands when both are present.

agents_count.description: Number of distinct Plinth agents invoked from .cursor/agents/; MUST equal the length of agents when both are present.

skills.description: Skill ids used during the run (for example 042-planning-openspec); empty array when none.

commands.description: Plinth command ids from .cursor/commands/ used during the run (for example implement-spec); empty array when none.

agents.description: Plinth agent ids from .cursor/agents/ invoked during the run (for example robot-tech-lead); empty array when none. Does not include the host tool model (record that under protocol_labels.model).
